name: Compression Comparison
description: Export a large dataset with different Parquet compression codecs and compare file sizes

checks.name: compression_comparison has 3 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM compression_comparison;
checks.description: One row per compression type: SNAPPY, ZSTD, UNCOMPRESSED

checks.name: Snappy file readable with 100000 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM read_parquet('/tmp/ex23_snappy.parquet');
checks.description: The SNAPPY compressed file must be readable and contain all 100,000 rows

checks.name: ZSTD file readable with 100000 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM read_parquet('/tmp/ex23_zstd.parquet');
checks.description: The ZSTD compressed file must be readable and contain all 100,000 rows
